name: Cranberry and Fruit Layer (Marguerite Patten)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the crusts off the bread.
2. Prepare and cook the fruit with water and sugar to taste.
3. Add the cranberry sauce just before the end of the cooking period, blending well.
4. Strain the fruit, reserving 5 fl (150 ml) of juice.
5. Place a layer of fruit at the bottom of the basin.
6. Add a layer of bread.
7. Repeat with more fruit and a little juice.
8. Continue filling the basin in alternating layers until finished with bread on top.
9. Place a small saucer and heavy weight over the pudding.
10. Allow to stand for at least 12 hours before turning out and serving with any remaining juice, cream or ice-cream, or custard.
Variation:
The pudding can also be made by lining the basin with bread, filling the cavity with fruit and a little juice, then covering the filling with more bread. Add the weight and allow to stand as directed.
